capabilities.purpose: Diagnose the first pedagogical issue in structured stoichiometric product-mass working.
capabilities.requiredInput: componentId stoichiometric-product-mass; componentVersion 1.0.0; strategyId MOLES_RATIO_MASS; evidencedReasoningNodeIds select-data, identify-target, amount-magnesium, apply-mole-ratio, amount-magnesium-oxide, mass-magnesium-oxide, report-unit, report-precision; finalAnswer value, unit and significantFigures; optional stoichiometricRatio and arithmeticWorkingValue
capabilities.outputContract: Decision, first pedagogical issue, failure code, evidence, support hint and trace id

capabilities.purpose: Legacy regression coverage for a simplified Kp contract.
